description: Ingest an external PR review into local review artifacts and apply the normal review disposition flow

content: Please read AGENTS.md and follow its instructions. Use fresh disk reads and current git state, not conversational memory. Re-read `codeInfoStatus/flow-state/current-plan.json` from disk first, for example with `cat codeInfoStatus/flow-state/current-plan.json`, determine the active `plan_path`, then extract repository paths from `additional_repositories` for this flow and re-open that exact relative `plan_path` from disk using explicit shell reads such as `sed`, `cat`, or `rg`. If the handoff does not explicitly identify any additional repositories, treat that as none. Re-check the current repository branch directly from git, for example with `git branch --show-current`, and re-check every additional repository branch directly from git, for example with `git -C <repo_root> branch --show-current`. Verify that the selected plan file exists in the current repository, that the story number in the current repository branch name matches the story number in the selected plan filename, and that every additional repository is still on a branch whose story number matches the selected plan filename. If those do not match, stop and say the current-plan handoff is stale and must be regenerated. Before relying on any file under `codeInfoTmp/reviews/`, verify that the repository ignores `codeInfoTmp/`. If it does not, add or update `.gitignore` before this flow continues, because review files under `codeInfoTmp/reviews/` are scratch artifacts and must not be committed. Then derive the external review input path from the selected plan story number using `codeInfoTmp/reviews/<story-number>-external-review-input.md`. Do not discover external review comments anywhere else and do not use timestamps or latest-file discovery. Verify that this external review input file exists. If it does not exist, stop and say the external review input file is missing and must be created only after `codeInfoTmp/` is ignored. Confirm the selected story, the exact external review input file path, and that this flow will treat that markdown file as the sole source of external review comments for artifact generation.

steps.label: Exit Minor-Fix Path Unless Minor Findings Remain
steps.question: Read `codeInfoStatus/flow-state/review-disposition-state.json` from disk first, for example with `cat codeInfoStatus/flow-state/review-disposition-state.json`, and answer only from that file's current contents. Answer yes if `needs_minor_fix_path` is not true. Answer no only when `needs_minor_fix_path` is true, meaning unresolved minor-batchable findings still remain and should continue to be attempted inline before task-up. Reply as JSON {"answer":"yes"|"no"}.

steps.label: Exit Minor-Fix Path After Sync Unless Another Minor Finding Remains
steps.question: Read `codeInfoStatus/flow-state/review-disposition-state.json` from disk after the sync step, for example with `cat codeInfoStatus/flow-state/review-disposition-state.json`, and read `codeInfoStatus/flow-state/minor-review-fix-result.json` from disk too, for example with `cat codeInfoStatus/flow-state/minor-review-fix-result.json`. Answer only from those freshly re-read files. Answer yes iff `needs_minor_fix_path` is not true, meaning no unresolved minor-batchable findings remain or the remaining minor findings were bulk-escalated out of the minor bucket. Answer no only if `needs_minor_fix_path` is true, meaning another unresolved minor-batchable finding still needs an inline attempt in this same pass. Reply as JSON {"answer":"yes"|"no"}.

steps.label: Exit Task-Up Path Unless Unresolved Findings Need Tasks
steps.question: Read `codeInfoStatus/flow-state/review-disposition-state.json` from disk first, for example with `cat codeInfoStatus/flow-state/review-disposition-state.json`, and answer only from that file's current contents. Answer yes iff `needs_task_up_path` is not true. Treat `resolved_minor_findings` as non-actionable for task-up. Answer no only when `needs_task_up_path` is true, meaning unresolved task-required findings or incomplete-review blockers must be encoded into the plan. Reply as JSON {"answer":"yes"|"no"}.

steps.label: Ensure Unresolved Review Findings Became Tasks
Refresh Current Plan Handoff After Review Task-Up
Ensure Review-Created Testing Steps Are Correct
Create Or Update Simple Story After Review Task-Up
Exit Task-Up Path After Encoding Review Findings
steps.question: Answer yes after the task-up path has either encoded unresolved review findings into the plan or recorded why that path cannot continue. Reply as JSON {"answer":"yes"}.

steps.label: Exit Review Loop After Serious Review Work Was Tasked Up
steps.question: Read `codeInfoStatus/flow-state/review-disposition-state.json` from disk first, for example with `cat codeInfoStatus/flow-state/review-disposition-state.json`. Then read `codeInfoStatus/flow-state/current-plan.json` from disk, for example with `cat codeInfoStatus/flow-state/current-plan.json`, determine `plan_path`, and re-open that exact plan from disk using `sed`, `cat`, or `rg` before answering. Answer only from those freshly re-read files. Answer yes iff the current review loop added or updated numbered review-fix tasks for unresolved task-required findings or incomplete-review blockers, meaning the flow should leave the review loop and return to the main implementation loop. Answer no otherwise, including when no numbered task was added or when only a post-loop final minor-fix revalidation task may still need to be considered. Reply as JSON {"answer":"yes"|"no"}.

steps.label: Exit Review Loop When No Further Minor Rerun Is Needed
steps.question: Read `codeInfoStatus/flow-state/review-disposition-state.json` from disk first, for example with `cat codeInfoStatus/flow-state/review-disposition-state.json`, and answer only from that file's current contents. Answer no iff `needs_review_rerun_before_close` is true and no serious review task-up work was added, because the review must run again against the new HEAD before the loop can finish. Answer yes iff `needs_review_rerun_before_close` is false, meaning the review loop may now finish cleanly and let downstream flow steps decide whether a post-loop final minor-fix revalidation task is needed. Reply as JSON {"answer":"yes"|"no"}.

steps.label: Generate Or Update Final Revalidation Task For Minor Fixes
